title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That begs the question... how and why did such a flood occur?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naturally, your first inclination might be to assume it was some kind of natural disaster...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, I can say for certain that it was no such thing... it was a man-made calamity!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You can't be serious!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this catastrophe was brought about by natural means,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There would be records denoting early warning signs several centuries earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a severe world altering event, after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But all my research into meteorology, geology, ecology, and atmospheric science confirmed that there was no such natural build-up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is impossible for such a drastic change to happen spontaneously within the span of a mere 100 years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Meaning the cause lies elsewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My suspicions were confirmed a few days ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...when I analyzed the world's current sea levels.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This will be hard to accept...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But that disaster 800 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was caused by ancient weapons technology, capable of sinking the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that very same firepower evidently still exists, just waiting to be used again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: In other words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that great war which ravaged the world during the void century...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...Is still ongoing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The genius sheds light on a forgotten history!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
